title: Environment Agency: EA2030 change for a better environment
body: "EA2030 change for a better environment is the Environment Agency’s strategy for 2025 to 2030. It sets out how the Environment Agency will fulfil its responsibilities over the next 5 years against its long-term goals for England. These are:   healthy air, land and water supporting nature’s recovery sustainable growth a nation resilient to climate change   It also introduces 6 guiding principles for how the Environment Agency will operate in the next 5 years, and it describes how the Environment Agency will change. Finally, it sets out the Environment Agency’s approach to measuring and evaluating performance. "
